Register Map

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x0
Size:
0x1c

Description

All-Purpose Registers

Contents

Offset Identifier Name
0x00 WRITE_PTR Write Poitner
0x04 READ_PTR Read Pointer
0x08 STATUS Buffer Status
0x0C CD_SPEED_THRESH Crash Detection Speed Threshold
0x10 CD_NON_FATAL_ACCEL_THRESH Crash Detection Non Fatal Acceleration Threshold
0x14 CD_FATAL_ACCEL_THRESH Crash Detection Fatal Acceleration Threshold
0x18 CD_ANGULAR_SPEED_THRESH Crash Detection Angular Speed Threshold
